data.title: Crypto unicorn Mesh secures $75M in Series C led by Dragonfly. The company aims to grow its presence in Latin America, Asia, and Europe.
data.description: A company specializing in cryptocurrency payments has announced intentions to broaden its reach in Latin America, Asia, and Europe after securing a new round of funding. This expansion aims to increase the company's presence in key markets, subsequently leading to greater accessibility for users and opportunities for growth. The specific amount raised in the funding round was not disclosed, but based on previous trends in the industry, it is expected to be a substantial investment to support the company's ambitious expansion plans. The move signifies the company's commitment to scaling its operations globally and tapping into emerging markets where cryptocurrency adoption is on the rise.

data.title: American Water Charitable Foundation donated $5.7 million in 2025 to strengthen communities. (charity, NYSE: AWK)
data.description: The Community Impact Report for 2025 was recently released in Camden, N.J. on January 27, 2026. The American Water Charitable Foundation, a non-profit organization founded by American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, shared this report. This highlights the philanthropic efforts made by the foundation. American Water's status as the largest in its field in the U.S. further underscores the significance of this report.

data.title: Field Data Collection App Market to reach $2.38 billion in 2025 with 15% CAGR growth from $2.07 billion in 2024. Widespread use of GPS devices contributing to growth.
data.description: In Dublin, the global market report on Field Data Collection App has been released, showcasing a substantial growth in the industry. The market is projected to grow from $2.07 billion in 2024 to $2.38 billion in 2025, representing a notable 15% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR). This surge is primarily attributed to the prevalent adoption of GPS-enabled gadgets, the rising demand for precise field data, the escalation in mobile device utilization, and enhanced internet connectivity.

data.title: Lottery.com Inc. rebrands as Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corp, will operate as SEGG. Name change due to Winter Storm Fern delays.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, on January 27, 2026, Lottery.com Inc. (NASDAQ: SEGG, LTRYW) disclosed that it has submitted a request to the Delaware Division of Corporations to modify its corporate name to Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corporation. The company, known as SEGG Media Corp, SEGG Media, and SEGG, will operate under these new identities. The name alteration will take effect promptly upon approval by the Delaware Secretary of State, although processing times may be delayed due to Winter Storm Fern's impact.

data.title: Johnson Outdoors (Nasdaq: JOUT) to share fiscal Q1 2026 results on Feb. 6, 2026, with conference call at 11 am ET.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Johnson Outdoors Inc. (Nasdaq: JOUT), a prominent company in outdoor recreation gear and technology, announced its plans to reveal financial data for the Fiscal 2026 first quarter on February 6, 2026, before the market opens. This will be followed by a conference call and audio webcast at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial results and deliver updates on the company's progress.

data.title: Globee Awards survey shows recognition boosts credibility and achievement for professionals and business owners.
data.description: Insights from a recent survey emphasize the importance of structured recognition in bolstering credibility, fostering progress, and achieving long-term success. The Globee® Awards, renowned for their merit-based and data-fueled business awards programs, revealed these findings in SILICON VALLEY, Calif., on Jan. 27, 2026.

data.title: Toll Brothers plans to introduce four luxury home collections in Northville, Michigan in spring 2026.
data.description: Upcoming in the spring of 2026 are the introduction of extravagant single-family residences, townhomes, and condos. These upscale designs are set to cater to a diverse range of preferences for prospective buyers looking to invest in exclusive properties. With a wide variety of options available, this launch is anticipated to bring forth numerous choices for buyers seeking luxury living arrangements.

data.title: Inventor from Akron creates PLUMBERS BUDDY back cushion for comfort while working; solves makeshift padding issue.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, an inventor from Akron, Ohio introduced a new product aimed at providing a soft and protective backrest for individuals working on plumbing tasks under sinks. The inventor shared that the inspiration for the product, named PLUMBERS BUDDY, stemmed from the need to eliminate the use of makeshift padding. Designed to offer comfort and protection, this innovative solution serves as a dedicated backrest for plumbing professionals, making it easier to work on tasks below the sink without discomfort.

data.title: AstroTurf appoints Matthew Miller as General Manager of GA Sports Construction, focusing on expansion. - 113 characters
data.description: In Dalton, Georgia, recently, AstroTurf®, a renowned company in synthetic turf systems and athletic surfacing solutions, appointed Matthew Miller as the General Manager for GA Sports Construction, a subsidiary of AstroTurf Corporation. Miller's main objective will be to enhance and broaden the company's reach.

data.title: MyWinners launches new website & mobile app on Jan 27, 2026, expanding access to regulated betting in the US.
data.description: A prominent betting brand, MyWinners, recently unveiled its upgraded website and mobile app on January 27, 2026, in Hamden, Connecticut. This launch marks a significant development as it enhances accessibility to regulated betting activities across the United States. The platform upgrade aims to cater to a wider audience and expand the availability of betting services to a larger demographic. This move is expected to increase engagement and participation in the betting industry, ultimately fostering growth in the sector. Overall, this initiative signifies a strategic effort by MyWinners to capitalize on the growing demand for regulated betting options, with the new website and app set to offer enhanced user experience and functionality.

data.title: Amperity research shows real-time personalization crucial for retailers, impacts purchase behavior and retention. #AI #RetailRevenue.
data.description: In Seattle, a recent study by Amperity reveals that despite significant investments by retailers in personalization, many shoppers continue to face generic and poorly timed experiences. This has led to potential revenue losses and a lack of lasting loyalty. The study highlights the importance of real-time personalization as a key revenue driver for retailers, impacting both purchase decisions and customer retention. The findings from the 2026 State of Personalization in Retail report emphasize the need for improved personalized experiences to maximize revenue opportunities.

data.title: New Oriental Education to release earnings on 2026-01-28. Analysts expect EPS of $0.28; hopes high for beating estimates. Guidance crucial for stock prices.
data.description: New Oriental Education (NYSE: EDU) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, 2026-01-28. Analysts are expecting the company to report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.28. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. It's crucial for newcomers to recognize that guidance plays a vital role in influencing stock prices. In its last earnings release, the company fell short of EPS estimates. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
